Contents

Constructor Properties Methods Examples Performance Security

HyperViewer Widget

HyperViewer is the main widget for rendering HTML, Markdown, and Quill Delta content in Flutter applications with high performance and perfect text selection.

Constructor

HyperViewer({
  Key? key,
  String? html,
  String? baseUrl,
  TextStyle? baseStyle,
  OnLinkTap? onLinkTap,
  bool selectable = true,
  bool sanitize = true,
  List<String>? allowedTags,
  HyperRenderMode mode = HyperRenderMode.auto,
  OnPerformanceReport? onPerformanceReport,
  WidgetBuilder? onLoadingBuilder,
  HyperWidgetBuilder? widgetBuilder,
})

Properties

html

html String?

The HTML content to render. Can be null for placeholder display.

baseUrl

baseUrl String?

Base URL for resolving relative URLs in links and images. If provided, relative URLs like img src="/photo.jpg" will be resolved to baseUrl + "/photo.jpg".

baseStyle

baseStyle TextStyle?

Base text style for the document. If not provided, uses Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyMedium.

onLinkTap

onLinkTap void Function(String url)?

Callback when a link is tapped. Receives the URL as parameter.

Important: Always validate URLs before opening them to prevent security issues. See Security section.

selectable

selectable bool

Whether text can be selected. Default: true. Set to false for better performance if selection is not needed.

sanitize

sanitize bool

Whether to sanitize HTML content. Default: true.

Security Warning: Never set sanitize: false for user-generated content. This can expose your app to XSS attacks.

allowedTags

allowedTags List<String>?

Whitelist of allowed HTML tags when sanitization is enabled. If null, uses default safe tags. Example: ['p', 'a', 'strong', 'em'].

mode

mode HyperRenderMode

Rendering mode. Options:

  • HyperRenderMode.sync - Synchronous parsing, best for small content
  • HyperRenderMode.virtualized - Async parsing with view virtualization
  • HyperRenderMode.auto - Automatically chooses based on content size (default)

Examples

Basic Usage

HyperViewer(
  html: '<p>Hello <strong>World</strong>!</p>',
)

With Link Handler

HyperViewer(
  html: articleHtml,
  onLinkTap: (url) {
    if (Uri.tryParse(url)?.scheme == 'https') {
      launchUrl(Uri.parse(url));
    }
  },
)

With Base URL

HyperViewer(
  html: '<img src="/images/photo.jpg">',
  baseUrl: 'https://example.com',
  // Image will load from: https://example.com/images/photo.jpg
)

Custom Styling

HyperViewer(
  html: content,
  baseStyle: TextStyle(
    fontSize: 16,
    color: Colors.black87,
    height: 1.5,
  ),
)

Performance Tips

Content Size Recommended Mode Tips
< 10KB sync or auto Fast initial render
10KB - 50KB auto Balanced performance
> 50KB virtualized Enable async parsing
> 500KB virtualized Required for smooth scrolling

Security Best Practices

Always Sanitize User Content

// ✅ SAFE
HyperViewer(
  html: userGeneratedContent,
  sanitize: true, // Default
)

// ❌ DANGEROUS
HyperViewer(
  html: userGeneratedContent,
  sanitize: false, // DON'T DO THIS!
)

Validate URLs

bool isSafeUrl(String url) {
  final uri = Uri.tryParse(url);
  if (uri == null) return false;

  // Block dangerous protocols
  if (uri.scheme == 'javascript' || uri.scheme == 'data') {
    return false;
  }

  // Only allow HTTPS
  return uri.scheme == 'https';
}

HyperViewer(
  html: content,
  onLinkTap: (url) {
    if (isSafeUrl(url)) {
      launchUrl(Uri.parse(url));
    }
  },
)

Restrict Allowed Tags

HyperViewer(
  html: userComment,
  sanitize: true,
  allowedTags: [
    'p', 'br', 'strong', 'em', 'a', 'ul', 'ol', 'li'
  ],
)

See Also

  • HyperRenderMode enum
  • Performance tuning guide
